rest_api_version_supported_max: v66.0 (highest in /services/data/ index; v60.0 used in observed traffic)

auth.primary: Salesforce session cookie 'sid' set on backmarket.my.site.com (HTTP-only, secure)
auth.aura_token: JWT-shape token in window.Aura.initConfig.token, embedded in every page; required for /sfsites/aura POSTs
auth.csrf: None observed beyond the token in the request body

host_constants.fwuid: stable per Aura framework rev (resniff if you get FWUID_MISMATCH)

rest_knowledge_articles_list.purpose: Standard SF Knowledge listing — but only returns ~11 most-viewed articles for this user; not a full enumerator. Returns: id (KnowledgeArticleId, kA0...), articleNumber, title, urlName, lastPublishedDate, categoryGroups[]. Body content NOT included.

rest_single_knowledge_article.purpose: Article metadata + layoutItems[]. Note: only works for the ~11 'channel-published' articles, not for the 242 visible via Aura. body content NOT included.

rest_data_category_groups.purpose: Lists data category groups (returns one: Seller_Support_Knowledge)

rest_data_category_tree.purpose: Full category tree (52 categories under Seller_Support_Knowledge). Names like 'Warranty_Withdrawal', 'BackShip', 'BuyBack_Overview_and_Activation'.

aura_apex_get_topic.purpose: Custom Apex controller. Returns top-5 articles per child topic for a topic-group root id, OR top-5 for a leaf topic. Capped at 5; cannot retrieve full list this way.

aura_get_record_with_fields.purpose: Fetch full article body. Body is in custom rich-text field Details__c (HTML). Supports batch (multiple actions in one POST). recordId is the article-VERSION id (ka0...), NOT the KnowledgeArticleId (kA0...). Use getArticleVersionId to map UrlName -> recordId.

aura_get_article_version_id.purpose: Map an article UrlName to its current published version id (ka0...). Use before getRecordWithFields if you only have the URL.

aura_search_scoped_results.purpose: Site-search. THIS IS THE PRIMARY ENUMERATION ENDPOINT. Returns 15+ records per page with full record metadata (Id, Title, UrlName, ArticleNumber, dates, language, PublishStatus). Use stop-word seeds ('the','a','of','and') to enumerate ALL accessible articles (242 confirmed). Search uses SF SOSL under the hood.

message_action.purpose_note: Top-bar links + featured topic list (the 9 home-page tile topics).

discovered_apex_controllers.ssc_KnowledgeController: exists but no methods accessible to current user
discovered_apex_controllers.ssc_HomeController: exists but no methods accessible to current user

endpoints_blocked_or_not_visible: /services/data/v60.0/sobjects/Knowledge__kav/{id}  (401 INVALID_SESSION_ID — sid is for community, not API)
rate_limits: No throttling observed during 242-article batch fetch (8/batch, 0.2s sleep). Salesforce default org limit is ~25k API calls / 24h.

notes_on_session.session_lifetime: Long — sid persists across page reloads
notes_on_session.aura_token_lifetime: Per-page; refreshed on every page load. Has 'iat' claim and is HS256-signed. Does NOT appear to expire short-term (no 'exp' enforcement seen)
notes_on_session.stale_token_recovery: Reload any /ssc/s/ page and re-read window.Aura.initConfig.token
